goal: Extend coderef-mcp-server with the v2 toolset (hotspots, cycles, what_exports, diff_impact, rag_search), validate everything against the Primary-Sources project (CODEREF/PROJECTS/primary-sources: repopulate with the new core, diff validation report, register .mcp.json, live-smoke), then retire the superseded coderef-intelligence-server endpoints per the operator-delegated ruling (A: retire; hotspots ships first).

tasks.description: Read coderef-mcp-server.ts buildToolHandlers + graph loading; confirm export-edge shape in graph.json (relationship=export, source=file-grain node, target=element) and resolved-edge filters reused by the v1 tools

Failing tests in __tests__/mcp-server.test.ts: hotspots (fan-in/fan-out ranking, limit cap, src-only flag honoring evidence.testOrigin), cycles (synthetic 3-node cycle detected via Tarjan SCC; acyclic fixture returns none), what_exports (file -> exported elements; ambiguity envelope on fragment match)
Implement hotspots, cycles, what_exports in buildToolHandlers + tool registrations (compact JSON, resolved-edges-only, <=5 ambiguity candidates, limit caps)
npx vitest run __tests__/mcp-server.test.ts green; full suite green
Live stdio smoke against coderef-core's own .coderef: tools/list shows 9 tools; hotspots/cycles/what_exports return sane data; docs/CLI.md + AGENT-CONTRACT tool tables updated
Commit Phase 1 + push to main; phase transition complete
Read rag-search.ts search flow (provider resolution from index metadata, vector store query) + confirm index.json element line ordering for diff hunk -> element mapping
Failing tests: diff_impact maps changed lines to enclosing elements and unions impact (fixture git repo); rag_search clean error envelope when rag-index.json absent (rag_index_missing)

Implement diff_impact (git diff -U0 parse -> element mapping -> union reverse-BFS) + rag_search (provider/store from rag-index.json metadata so query embeddings always match the index; graceful errors when index or embedder unavailable); register both (11 tools)

Primary-Sources validation (CODEREF/PROJECTS/primary-sources): repopulate with the new core build, diff validation report vs the 2026-05 baseline (builtin/unresolved reclassification + 14-field shape expected), write PS .mcp.json registering coderef-core domain, live-smoke the 11-tool surface against PS artifacts
npx vitest run - full suite green
Commit Phase 2 + push; phase transition complete
PLACEHOLDER. Phase 3 tasks not yet authored. Pre-condition: Phase 2 must be COMPLETED + REVIEWED before this phase plan is authored.

hard_stops.reason: Phase 2 plan authored 2026-06-13; operator standing approval + explicit PS-target directive
Phase 3 plan_deferred=true. Hard stop fires at phase planning gate.

plan_type_rationale: Rolling plan: P1 graph tools planned; P2 flow tools + PS validation and P3 intel-server retirement deferred to follow-on stubs.

rolling_plan.next_phase_authoring: ad-hoc plan.json edit until /plan-next-phase skill exists (STUB-358)
